name: avatar-runtime-preflight-fragment
description: Reusable fragment: verify camera capture and avatar registration prerequisites before avatar onboarding runs.

context.preflight_cmd: node --input-type=module -e "import { createVirtualCameraBridge } from './dist/libs/core/virtual-camera-bridge.js'; const bridge = createVirtualCameraBridge(); const probe = await bridge.probe(); if (!probe.available) { throw new Error(probe.reason || 'camera unavailable'); } console.log(probe.backend);"
